name: Word Pull Up
description: A text animation where each word pulls up from below with a spring-like bounce effect, creating an energetic entrance animation.
whenToUse: Use for hero headlines, section titles, or any text that should animate in with a dynamic upward pull motion.

props.name: words
props.description: The text content to animate word by word

props.name: wrapperFramerProps
props.description: Framer motion props for the wrapper element

props.name: framerProps
props.description: Framer motion props for each word
